blocked_claims.label: Responsibility path recorded
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Ask buyer/importer who is importer of record and which Incoterm applies; route to freight/legal review if needed.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not treat missing or unreviewed Incoterms as a legal responsibility decision.

blocked_claims.label: Origin evidence collected
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Attach certificate of origin or origin-supporting documents and route to scoped review.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not say origin is confirmed from a country name or source route.

blocked_claims.label: Document fields extracted as draft
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Ask the user to confirm extracted fields, then route the packet to the correct reviewer lane.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not treat parser output as authenticity, completeness, or compliance proof.

blocked_claims.label: Supplier evidence collected
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Request supplier registration, export ability, product docs, certificates, inspection, and prior-shipment evidence.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not say supplier verified or recommended.

blocked_claims.label: Tariff confirmed
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Obtain a qualified customs review or authoritative ruling evidence.
blocked_claims.reason: Tariff confirmed remains blocked until authoritative tariff/ruling evidence and qualified review exist.

blocked_claims.label: CFIA approved
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Attach dated CFIA/AIRS result or permit evidence and qualified reviewer finding.
blocked_claims.reason: CFIA approved remains blocked until official permit/admissibility evidence and qualified review exist.

blocked_claims.label: Buyer validated
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Collect dated buyer evidence; directory rows are lead sources only.
blocked_claims.reason: Buyer validated remains blocked until dated buyer response, meeting, LOI, PO, or paid-order evidence exists.

blocked_claims.label: Supplier verified
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Collect supplier proof and route to a scoped reviewer.
blocked_claims.reason: Supplier verified remains blocked until registration, export ability, product evidence, certificates/inspection, and reviewer assessment exist.

blocked_claims.label: Customs ready
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Resolve importer of record, Incoterms, source freshness, and broker/customs review.
blocked_claims.reason: Customs ready remains blocked until broker/customs review and required import/export evidence exist.

blocked_claims.label: Shipment approved
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Use the packet for preparation only; final shipment decisions require qualified professionals and owner approval.
blocked_claims.reason: Shipment approved is not supported by this product scope.

evidence_citations.claim_boundary: Reference-only source. It does not prove supplier suitability, tariff classification, CFIA clearance, buyer demand, or import approval.
Reference-only source. It does not create customs, tariff, release, accounting, or compliance advice.
Reference-only source. It does not prove CFIA clearance or legal compliance.

proof_boundary: Report exports organize packet evidence and review work; they do not approve trade action or remove blocked claims.
purpose: Show the known product/lane context, missing fields, official source routes, and next safe move.

score_references.label: yellow
score_references.next_action: Attach dated trade dataset rows, market-access comparison, and buyer/operator validation before treating the signal as a decision.
score_references.reason: Local market signal score is 55/100 before external demand, dataset, and buyer proof.

score_references.label: red
score_references.next_action: Attach missing product, commercial, origin, review, buyer, and source evidence.
score_references.reason: 3 evidence rows attached and 10 required items missing.

score_references.label: red
score_references.next_action: Run dated source refresh and record hash/change classification.
score_references.reason: Official/reference sources are routed, but current-source proof and qualified review are still required.

score_references.label: red
score_references.next_action: Collect dated buyer interaction and supplier evidence, then route to review.
score_references.reason: Buyer level -1 and supplier level 0 are recorded without validation/verification claims.

score_references.label: red
score_references.next_action: Confirm importer of record, Incoterms, buyer/importer role, and broker review path.
score_references.reason: Confirm importer of record and Incoterms before shipment or buyer claims.

score_references.label: red
score_references.next_action: Generate a compliance review packet and request qualified review.
score_references.reason: 7 blocker rows keep external decisions closed.

source_citations.claim_boundary: Supports research routing only; it does not validate buyer demand or profitability.
Supports market-access comparison routing only; qualified review is required before tariff or market-access claims.
source_citations.source_name: International Trade Centre Market Access Map

source_citations.claim_boundary: Routes users to official and qualified review paths; the product does not replace CBSA or a customs professional.
source_citations.source_name: Canada Border Services Agency commercial import guidance

source_citations.claim_boundary: Reference route only; importers and reviewers must confirm current requirements for the exact product and import time.
Security implementation guidance; hosted readiness still requires product-specific security review.
Governance reference only; it does not certify the product or approve AI outputs.
Payment implementation reference only; live checkout remains disabled until payment review and production setup are complete.
Privacy design input only; legal/privacy approval requires qualified review for the product and data flows.
source_citations.source_name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada PIPEDA principles

summary_points: Purpose: Show the known product/lane context, missing fields, official source routes, and next safe move.
Red or blocked score lanes: evidence_completeness_score, source_freshness_score, buyer_supplier_evidence_score, responsibility_clarity_score, decision_safety_score
Blocked claims remain visible in this report.
title: Starter Trade Readiness Packet
